title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SANDY HEALTH CENTER CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Referral and coordination of substance use treatment services through Intensive Care Coordination. Child outpatient services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 39740 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger. Some programs serve up to age 25. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6:00pm, Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 742-5335 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8471 Main phone Primary Care (503) 722-6950 Other Behavioral Health Main phone (503) 742-5335 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and referral FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. State General Fund for individuals who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday-Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANDY HEALTH CENTER
